vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: Document click-commit rendering mode and plain-text Confirmation Gate in deft-directive-interview skill.

plan.title: Interview skill: click-commit rendering mode + plain-text Confirmation Gate (#477)

narratives.Overview: Rules 8-11 of deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md assume plain-text keyboard rendering. On click-commit structured tools (e.g. Warp ask_user_question), Back / Discuss / Enter-confirm have no keystroke equivalent. Document an explicit click-commit rendering mode and require plain-text for the Rule 6 Confirmation Gate on click-commit hosts.
narratives.Problem: On click-commit hosts, deterministic-interview affordances silently degrade: no Back, no Discuss, no confirm-after-select, and the Rule 6 Confirmation Gate itself becomes a single-click commit with no typed safeguard.
narratives.Action: Edit skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md to add (A) Click-Commit Rendering subsection under Rule 2 specifying Back / Discuss options and default-marker handling; (B) Rule 6 addendum requiring plain-text typed confirm on click-commit hosts; (C) Rule 11 two-mode legend split. Add content tests.
narratives.Test: tests/content/test_interview_click_commit.py asserts: click-commit subsection exists naming Back, Discuss, default marker; Rule 6 contains plain-text-gate-on-click-commit requirement and MUST-NOT anti-pattern; at least one example shows click-commit rendering; MUST-NOT forbids treating click-commit return as Rule-8-compliant.
narratives.Outcome: Interview skill specifies click-commit rendering behavior; Rule 6 plain-text gate preserves a typed commit step; content tests lock in the specification.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Add Click-Commit Rendering subsection under Rule 2 (Back/Discuss/default-marker)
Add Rule 6 plain-text Confirmation Gate requirement for click-commit hosts
Rewrite Rule 11 legend behavior for plain-text vs click-commit modes
